title: Corporate Sales Trainee (Short-Term 3 Months min.)
description:
Want to make the most of your break before school starts?
Join us for a hands-on experience where you get to pick up real business skills, boost your confidence, and gain exposure to B2B clients — all within a short, impactful period.

At David N Goliath Group, we partner with leading brands to grow their presence through client-facing sales and marketing. This opportunity is designed for those who want practical experience, fast learning, and something meaningful to put on their résumé before school begins.

(Minimally 3 Months Commitment - Mondays to Fridays, Office hours)

🌟 Make the most of your time with us

  • Build real-world skills quickly — B2B sales, communication, customer engagement, and branding

  • Hands-on client exposure that most students only get much later

  • Learn directly from mentors who will guide your growth

  • Develop leadership and confidence in a short time

  • A fun, supportive team that makes learning easier and faster

  • Performance incentives if you enjoy taking on challenges

This is NOT a desk-bound job — you’ll get real client-facing experience and develop practical business skills that give you an edge when school starts.

💼 Skills you will Pick Up

Client Needs Analysis

Understand how to identify business challenges and recommend solutions.

Corporate Communication

Learn how to present confidently and speak to stakeholders.

Client Product Knowledge

Pick up the ability to learn and present business offerings clearly.

B2B Outreach

Engage business owners and decision-makers through outreach and appointments.

Customer Acquisition & Relationship Skills

Build trust with clients and strengthen long-term business relationships.

After-Sales Support

Help ensure a smooth customer experience after onboarding.

These are valuable skills you’ll carry into university presentations, group projects, internships, and future career opportunities.

✨ Who This Is For

  • Students waiting to enter university, or on a gap break.

  • Individuals who want real corporate exposure before school begins

  • Communicators who enjoy speaking to people

  • Fast learners who want to pick up skills quickly

  • No experience needed — we’ll train you

📅 Commitment

Minimum commitment: 3 months full time (Mon-Fri Office Hours)
(Extensions available if you enjoy the role)

🚀 Ready to Make Your Break Count?

If you want a meaningful and skill-building experience before heading back to school, we’d love to have you join us.

postedCompany.description: We are an outsourced Sales and Marketing Solutions company that focuses on below-the-line marketing. We work with multinational companies across various industries to help grow their business through targeted marketing and sales efforts.
postedCompany.name: DAVID N GOLIATH GROUP PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
